patterns.hypothesis_primary: UP_TRI breakouts in Bank sector during Choppy regime fail because of [mechanism TBD]. Initial candidate mechanisms (investigation may surface others): (1) sector-internal churn — rate-sensitive flows + index rebalancing absorbing breakout momentum; (2) sub-sector heterogeneity — PSU banks behaving differently from private banks; (3) macro-window proximity — RBI policy / Bank earnings windows distort cohort (e.g., ±3 trading days); (4) volume-divergence — weak-volume breakouts are retail-driven, no institutional follow-through. Investigation tests these candidates plus any additional mechanisms surfaced during Phase 3 cohort comparison (LOSER vs WINNER differentiator analysis).
patterns.hypothesis_inverse: On dates when UP_TRI × Bank × Choppy fails, [pattern TBD] profits. Initial candidate inverse patterns (investigation may surface others): (1) DOWN_TRI × Bank × Choppy on same dates — does shorting the same stocks work? (2) UP_TRI × defensive sectors (Pharma / Energy / FMCG) on same Choppy days — does sector rotation profit? (3) BULL_PROXY (mean-reversion) on same Bank stocks 2-3 days post-failed-breakout — does fade-the-failed-breakout work? Investigation tests these candidates plus any additional inverse patterns surfaced during Phase 3 cross-cohort analysis.
patterns.methodology: 15-year historical backtest (2011-01 → 2026-04); cohort baseline per PROMOTION_PROTOCOL.md Gate 3 thresholds; mechanism analysis (8 differentiators per Gate 5 examples); inverse-pattern search; train/test OOS validation (train 2011-2022 / test 2023-2026); ground-truth validation against /lab/registry/ground_truth_batches/GTB-001.json + GTB-002.json.

live_evidence_at_registration.today_subset: Today's 17 resolutions are SUBSET of the 26 lifetime resolved (not additional): W=2 L=14 F=1 today
live_evidence_at_registration.first_observed: earliest scan_date in cohort per signal_history
live_evidence_at_registration.tier_eligibility_today: Below Tier A n≥50 minimum AND below Tier B n≥30 minimum. Cannot promote to ANY Lab tier on live evidence alone today. Lab investigation expands n via 15-year backtest replay.
live_evidence_at_registration.kill_002_status: Ships separately on main branch as conviction_tag=LIVE_EVIDENCE_ONLY (per Principle 6); not a Lab-tier ship; awaits S-6 prerequisite + INV-001 validation for potential Lab re-promotion.

patterns.expected_outcome: Three paths: (a) Structural failure confirmed + mechanism articulated → kill_002 re-promoted to Lab Tier A or S kill (replacing LIVE_EVIDENCE_ONLY tag); (b) Sub-cohort filter found → kill_002 narrowed to specific Bank sub-sectors; remaining sub-cohorts promoted to boost; (c) Recent-regime artifact → kill_002 remains as live operational rule but does NOT earn Lab tier; investigation pivots to regime classifier review.

patterns.hypothesis_primary: UP_TRI × Bank × Bear cohort genuinely profits at near-100% WR due to [mechanism TBD]; n=8 is real signal not statistical artifact. Initial candidate mechanisms (investigation may surface others): (1) Bank stocks oversold during Bear macro; defensive rebound on any breakout signal; (2) rate-cycle correlation — Bear regime often coincides with rate-cut expectations → bank-positive; (3) sample-window bias — Apr 2026 Bear regime was specific 9-day window; cohort may not generalize. Investigation tests for sample-window bias by splitting historical Bear regimes by sub-period and verifying WR holds across multiple Bear episodes (2013, 2016, 2018, 2020, 2022).
patterns.methodology: Backtest infrastructure same as INV-001; cohort baseline 15 years; mechanism analysis; OOS validation. Specifically test for sample-window bias via sub-period split across multiple historical Bear regimes.

live_evidence_at_registration.tier_eligibility_today: Insufficient n for any Lab tier (Tier B minimum n=30; Tier A n=50; Tier S n=100). Lab investigation must establish whether 100% WR is genuine cohort edge or small-sample artifact via 15-year backtest expansion.

patterns.expected_outcome: Three paths: (a) Historical confirmation across multiple Bear episodes → high-confidence Tier S boost (UP_TRI × Bank × Bear with conviction_tag=HIGH); (b) Recent-regime artifact (Apr 2026 Bear was special) → Tier B watch only; flag for re-investigation when next genuine Bear regime arrives; (c) Statistical small-sample noise → reject; document; require larger sample before re-investigation.

patterns.hypothesis_primary: Some sector × regime × signal triples are reliably profitable; others reliably unprofitable. The 99-cohort matrix surfaces tradeable structure not visible from individual investigations.
patterns.methodology: Backtest-driven matrix population. For each of 99 cohort triples (3 signals × 11 sectors × 3 regimes), compute backtest baseline statistics (n, W, L, F, WR, avg pnl, Sharpe, max drawdown). Apply train/test OOS protocol per PROMOTION_PROTOCOL.md Gate 3; rank cohorts by tier eligibility.

live_evidence_at_registration.tier_eligibility_today: N/A — INV-003 is a discovery scan, not a single-cohort hypothesis. Output is the matrix itself; individual cohorts surfaced from the matrix become their own pre-registered investigations.

patterns.expected_outcome: Matrix population: 99 cohorts ranked by tier eligibility. 3-5 high-conviction promotion candidates (Tier A or S boost) identified for individual deeper investigation. 5-10 kill candidates identified for INV-NN follow-ups. Heat-map visualization stored in /lab/analyses/INV-003/cohort_matrix.html.
patterns.note: INV-003 promotes individual cohorts surfaced from the matrix, not the matrix itself. Each surfaced cohort opens its own pre-registered INV-NN.

cohort.filter_proposed: macro_proximity_days within ±3 of RBI MPC announcement

patterns.hypothesis_primary: UP_TRI × Bank × Choppy within ±3 trading days of RBI MPC announcement fails more than baseline. Mechanism: macro uncertainty around policy decisions distorts technical breakout follow-through.
patterns.methodology: Calendar-event tagged backtest. RBI MPC dates pulled from public calendar (8 meetings/year). Bank earnings announcement dates from corporate filings. Tag every UP_TRI × Bank × Choppy signal with macro_proximity_days field; split cohort by proximity bucket; test for WR variance.

live_evidence_at_registration.tier_eligibility_today: Filter pattern; eligibility computed per parent UP_TRI × Bank × Choppy cohort + sub-cohort split. Sub-cohort must independently pass tier requirements per PROMOTION_PROTOCOL.md filter rule.

patterns.expected_outcome: Filter pattern outcome: either (a) macro-proximity filter materially distinguishes win/loss within cohort → graduates as Tier A or B filter pattern; (b) no material distinction → reject; non-filter mechanisms more important.
patterns.note: Low priority; likely won't execute until INV-001..INV-004 complete. Pre-registered for hypothesis discipline.

registry_notes: INV-004 is intentionally NOT pre-registered. Its threshold specifics depend on findings from INV-001 mechanism analysis (volume-divergence candidate); pre-registering INV-004 with concrete volume thresholds before INV-001 surfaces evidence would be fitting hypothesis to forthcoming evidence (post-hoc disguised as pre-registration). INV-004 enters this registry once INV-001 completes Phase 3 mechanism analysis. See ROADMAP.md Investigation Queue intro for asymmetry-rationale.

kill_002 is NOT a Lab pattern. kill_002 ships on main branch as conviction_tag=LIVE_EVIDENCE_ONLY based on live signal_history evidence + trader judgment (per Lab Discipline Principle 6). Lab investigation INV-001 may later validate kill_002 against multi-year backtest; if validated, kill_002 may be re-promoted to a Lab tier (S or A) with empirical-cohort tag. Until then, kill_002 is operational-only, not Lab-validated.
